THEALCHEMIST-ACCLIMATE.description: At the start of your turn, if you have more than 3 [gold]Poison[/gold], gain {plating:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-ACCLIMATE.title: Acclimate
THEALCHEMIST-ACCRETION.description: At the start of your turn, gain {plating:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-ACCRETION.title: Accretion
THEALCHEMIST-ACCRUE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Hits an additional time for each time you've taken [gold]Poison[/gold] damage this combat.
THEALCHEMIST-ACCRUE.title: Accrue
THEALCHEMIST-ADULTERATE.description: Choose a card in your Hand to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Dross+[/green]|[gold]Dross[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-ADULTERATE.title: Adulterate
THEALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.description:
Lose all [gold]Poison[/gold].
Gain that much [gold]Regen[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+1|}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Citrinitas+[/green]|[gold]Citrinitas[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.title: Albedo
THEALCHEMIST-AMPLIFICATION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Triple|Double} the [gold]Poison[/gold], [gold]Regen[/gold] and [gold]Plating[/gold] on ALL enemies and players.
THEALCHEMIST-AMPLIFICATION.title: Amplification
THEALCHEMIST-ASSAY.title: Assay
THEALCHEMIST-ASSIMILATE.title: Assimilate
THEALCHEMIST-AUREATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Dross[/gold], [gold]Effluvium[/gold] and [gold]Distillate[/gold] into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-AUREATE.title: Aureate
THEALCHEMIST-AUGUR.title: Augur
THEALCHEMIST-BIDE.title: Bide
THEALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Toxic[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.title: Carapace
THEALCHEMIST-CATALYSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Trigger [gold]Poison[/gold] on the enemy.
THEALCHEMIST-CATALYSE.title: Catalyse
THEALCHEMIST-CATHARSIS.title: Catharsis
THEALCHEMIST-CHORUS.description: Allies deal double damage against [gold]Poisoned[/gold] enemies for {turns:diff()} {turns:plural:turn|turns}.
THEALCHEMIST-CHORUS.title: Chorus
THEALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA.description: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, gain {gold:diff()} Gold.
THEALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA.title: Chrysopoeia
THEALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal that much damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Rubedo+[/green]|[gold]Rubedo[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.title: Citrinitas
THEALCHEMIST-COMPOUND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Hits two additional times if you applied [gold]Poison[/gold] this turn.
THEALCHEMIST-COMPOUND.title: Compound
THEALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.title: Congeal
THEALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION.description: At the start of your turn, if you have both [gold]Poison[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}{IfUpgraded:show: and draw 1 card|}.
THEALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION.title: Conjunction
THEALCHEMIST-CORNERED.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If your HP is below 50%, deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
THEALCHEMIST-CORNERED.title: Cornered
THEALCHEMIST-CORRODE.title: Corrode
THEALCHEMIST-DECANT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Create a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]} in your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-DECANT.title: Decant
THEALCHEMIST-DECOCTION.title: Decoction
THEALCHEMIST-DEFEND_ALCHEMIST.title: Defend
THEALCHEMIST-DELUGE.description:
Apply X [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Double X if it's 4 or more.
THEALCHEMIST-DELUGE.title: Deluge
THEALCHEMIST-DEPLETE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy loses 6 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THEALCHEMIST-DEPLETE.title: Deplete
THEALCHEMIST-DETONATION.description: Whenever you create a card, deal {damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-DETONATION.title: Detonation
THEALCHEMIST-DISTILLATE.title: Distillate
THEALCHEMIST-DROSS.title: Dross
THEALCHEMIST-EFFLUVIUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-EFFLUVIUM.title: Effluvium
THEALCHEMIST-ELIXIR.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[green]Procure a random potion.[/green]
|}At the start of your turn, procure a random potion.
THEALCHEMIST-ELIXIR.title: Elixir
THEALCHEMIST-EMANATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-EMANATE.title: Emanate
THEALCHEMIST-EMERGENCE.description:
Choose a card in your Exhaust Pile.
Return it to your Hand{IfUpgraded:show: upgraded|}.
THEALCHEMIST-EMERGENCE.title: Emergence
THEALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
THEALCHEMIST-EPIPHANY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Transform a card in your Hand into a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-EPIPHANY.title: Epiphany
THEALCHEMIST-EXPLOIT.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each debuff on the enemy.
THEALCHEMIST-EXPLOIT.title: Exploit
THEALCHEMIST-EXUDE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Regen[/gold]|}.
THEALCHEMIST-EXUDE.title: Exude
THEALCHEMIST-FALTER.title: Falter
THEALCHEMIST-FESTER.description: Poison is triggered against the enemy {triggers:diff()} additional {triggers:plural:time|times} next turn.
THEALCHEMIST-FESTER.title: Fester
THEALCHEMIST-FLUSH.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Draw that many cards{IfUpgraded:show:+1|}.
THEALCHEMIST-FLUSH.title: Flush
THEALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.title: Fumigate
THEALCHEMIST-GLEAN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose 1 of 3 cards in your Draw Pile and add it to your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-GLEAN.title: Glean
THEALCHEMIST-HAEMORRHAGE.description:
Lose HP equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal {IfUpgraded:show:triple|double} that much damage.
THEALCHEMIST-HAEMORRHAGE.title: Haemorrhage
THEALCHEMIST-HARVEST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If Fatal, gain {rewards:diff()} additional Potion {rewards:plural:reward|rewards}.
THEALCHEMIST-HARVEST.title: Harvest
THEALCHEMIST-HONE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Upgrade ALL cards in your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-HONE.title: Hone
THEALCHEMIST-HORMESIS.title: Hormesis
THEALCHEMIST-ICHOR.description: Deal damage equal to your missing HP.
THEALCHEMIST-ICHOR.title: Ichor
THEALCHEMIST-IMMOLATION.description: Transform any number of cards in your Hand into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Effluviums+[/green]|[gold]Effluviums[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-IMMOLATION.title: Immolation
THEALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play a random Skill from your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
THEALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT.title: Inducement
THEALCHEMIST-INOCULATE.title: Inoculate
THEALCHEMIST-INVERSION.description: Whenever you are healed, deal that much damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
THEALCHEMIST-INVERSION.title: Inversion
THEALCHEMIST-INVIGORATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
THEALCHEMIST-LEADEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dross[/gold] into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-LEADEN.title: Leaden
THEALCHEMIST-LIBATION.description:
Consume all your Potions.
For each consumed, gain {block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-LIBATION.title: Libation
THEALCHEMIST-MATERIALISE.description: Whenever you create a card, gain {blockGain:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-MATERIALISE.title: Materialise
THEALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM.description: Whenever you create a card, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM.title: Mercurial Form
THEALCHEMIST-METABOLISE.description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+2|}.
THEALCHEMIST-METABOLISE.title: Metabolise
THEALCHEMIST-MIASMA.description: Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and players.
THEALCHEMIST-MIASMA.title: Miasma
THEALCHEMIST-MORTIFY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each debuff you have.
THEALCHEMIST-MORTIFY.title: Mortify
THEALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and players.
Add an {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Albedo+[/green]|[gold]Albedo[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.title: Nigredo
THEALCHEMIST-OSMOSIS.title: Osmosis
THEALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]Regen[/gold] lost.
THEALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
THEALCHEMIST-PARTITION.description: Deal {totalDamage:diff()} damage divided among ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-PARTITION.title: Partition
THEALCHEMIST-PERMEATE.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, apply {poisonPerBlock:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-PERMEATE.title: Permeate
THEALCHEMIST-PHILTRE.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain {amount:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {amount:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-PHILTRE.title: Philtre
THEALCHEMIST-POTENTIATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Hits an additional time for each potion you've used this combat.
THEALCHEMIST-POTENTIATE.title: Potentiate
THEALCHEMIST-POULTICE.description:
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-POULTICE.title: Poultice
THEALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you use a potion, procure another potion of that type.
THEALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE.title: Precipitate
THEALCHEMIST-PUNCTURE.title: Puncture
THEALCHEMIST-REAGENT.description: Whenever you use a potion while this card is in hand, gain {block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw 1 card.
THEALCHEMIST-REAGENT.title: Reagent
THEALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Put a card from your Discard Pile into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.title: Reconstitute
THEALCHEMIST-RECTIFY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-RECTIFY.title: Rectify
THEALCHEMIST-REINFORCE.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each debuff you have.
THEALCHEMIST-REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
THEALCHEMIST-RESOLVE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for each {hpThreshold:diff()} HP you are missing.
THEALCHEMIST-RESOLVE.title: Resolve
THEALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.description:
Gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Upgrade a card in your Hand.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Nigredo+[/green]|[gold]Nigredo[/gold]} into your Hand.
THEALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.title: Rubedo
THEALCHEMIST-SALVAGE.description: Choose 2 cards in your Discard Pile to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillates+[/green]|[gold]Distillates[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-SALVAGE.title: Salvage
THEALCHEMIST-SECRETION.description: When hit by an attack, apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to the attacker.
THEALCHEMIST-SECRETION.title: Secretion
THEALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT.title: Sediment
THEALCHEMIST-SEPSIS.description: Poisoned enemies take an additional {percent:diff()}% damage.
THEALCHEMIST-SEPSIS.title: Sepsis
THEALCHEMIST-SHED_SKIN.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Lose all [gold]Plating[/gold].
Deals additional damage equal to double your [gold]Plating[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-SHED_SKIN.title: Shed Skin
THEALCHEMIST-SIPHON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw a card for each debuff you have.
THEALCHEMIST-SIPHON.title: Siphon
THEALCHEMIST-SPATTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {hits:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
THEALCHEMIST-SPATTER.title: Spatter
THEALCHEMIST-STEEP.title: Steep
THEALCHEMIST-STRIKE_ALCHEMIST.title: Strike
THEALCHEMIST-TEMPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your Hand to [gold]Transform[/gold] into a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]}.
THEALCHEMIST-TEMPER.title: Temper
THEALCHEMIST-TINGE.title: Tinge
THEALCHEMIST-TRANSPOSE.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:twice |}that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-TRANSPOSE.title: Transpose
THEALCHEMIST-SUFFUSE.description:
Allies gain {regen:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Remove [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Frail[/gold] from Allies.
THEALCHEMIST-SUFFUSE.title: Suffuse
THEALCHEMIST-TRIA_PRIMA.description:
Apply X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Plating[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-TRIA_PRIMA.title: Tria Prima
THEALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional {extraPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE.title: Virulence
THEALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY.description: The first time your HP changes each turn, apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY.title: Volatility
THEALCHEMIST-WINDFALL.description: Whenever you Procure a potion during combat, draw {draw:diff()} {draw:plural:card|cards} and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THEALCHEMIST-WINDFALL.title: Windfall
